case_title: MELVIN, LASONYA VS KRAVETSKIY, BORIS et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MELVIN, LASONYA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KRAVETSKIY, BORIS KRAVETSKIY, DMITRY DBA WORLD AUTO SALES $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,200.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. PLAINTIFF DISMISSED AGAINST DEFENDANT KRAVETSKY, DMITRY - NO SERVICE. THE CONTRACT FOR THE SALE OF THE CAR IS HEREBY RESCINDED. CONCURRENTLY WITH PAYMENT OF THIS JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF SHALL RETURN TO DEFENDANT THE FOLLOWING: ONE 1994 FORD CROWN VICTORIA PURCHASED 7/17/05; CONTRACT #552. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MELVIN, LASONYA AS TO DEFENDANT KRAVETSKIY, BORIS KRAVETSKIY, DMITRY DBA WORLD AUTO SALES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KRAVETSKIY, BORIS
